signals.headline: Solana ETF Assets Cross $1 Billion Milestone | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana ETF Assets Cross $1 Billion Milestone | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana's ETF assets have passed $1 billion, with SOL trading near $84.91[2]. The network also processed record daily fees above $500,000[2].

signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launches on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launches on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
Wrapped XRP went live on Solana on April 17 via Hex Trust and LayerZero[1], allowing XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem. XRP surged 5.15% in the 48 hours following this launch and is trading at $1.40[1].

signals.headline: Solana Posts Cryptic "XRP" Tweet | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Posts Cryptic "XRP" Tweet | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 15, Solana's official X account posted a single word—"XRP"—accompanied by a cinematic logo animation, with follow-up replies referencing "589 NDAs" and "time to flip the switch"[4]. This sparked significant community speculation about potential partnerships or announcements[4].

signals.headline: XRP Institutional Adoption Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Institutional Adoption Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP reached $1.37 after Rakuten opened payments to 44 million users in Japan, and CME futures are now trading actively with seven spot ETFs holding $1 billion combined[2].
